items.caption: A close-up of a snickers candy bar with its wrapper partially visible. the wrapper is predominantly brown with blue and red accents. the text on the wrapper includes the brand name "snickers" in large blue letters, followed by "milk chocolate, peanuts, caramel, nougat" in smaller white text. the candy bar itself is not visible, but the wrapper suggests it contains milk chocolate, peanuts, caramel, and nougat. the background is plain white, emphasizing the candy bar and its packaging.
